prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I am so incredibly sorry for your loss. Please know that you're in my thoughts during this difficult time, and I'm here for you in any way you need. Your mother's memory will live on through the love she shared with you. Sending you strength and condolences.
